auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to manage your merchant account.
auth.forgot_password_hint: Contact the MITHQAL admin who created your account to issue a new password.
auth.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.generic_error: We could not sign you in. Please try again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.hero_title: Everything your merchant needs, in one portal.
auth.hero_subtitle: Configure branches, manage your POS staff, build your menu, and watch your sales — all from a workspace built for Oman.

change_password.title: Change password
change_password.subtitle: Update the password you use to sign in.
change_password.subtitle_forced: For your security, choose your own password before continuing.
change_password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
change_password.error_generic: Could not update your password. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Welcome
dashboard.subtitle: This is your merchant control panel. As MITHQAL provisions more capabilities, they will appear here.

portal_users.title: Portal Users
portal_users.subtitle: Invite teammates into your MITHQAL workspace, decide which branches they can see, and rotate credentials when needed.
portal_users.empty_state: No teammates yet. Create your first one to get started.
portal_users.no_branches: No branches yet — create a branch first to restrict access.

assign_roles.title: Assign roles
assign_roles.hint: Pick one or more roles. The user gets the union of every assigned role's permissions.
assign_roles.no_roles: No roles available yet. Create one in Roles & Permissions first.

create.title: Create a new teammate
create.subtitle: We will generate a one-time password you can share with them out of band.

password_modal.title: One-time password
password_modal.subtitle: Copy this password and share it with {name} ({email}) through a secure channel.
password_modal.one_shot_warning: This password is shown once. After you close this dialog it cannot be retrieved — only reset.

pos_staff.title: POS Staff
pos_staff.subtitle: Hire the cashiers, waiters, kitchen, and supervisors who run your registers. Each one gets a 6-digit PIN they use to unlock the POS device.
pos_staff.search_placeholder: Search by name, staff code, or branch…
pos_staff.empty_state: No staff yet. Hire your first teammate to get started.
pos_staff.no_branches_hint: Add at least one branch before hiring staff — every staff member belongs to a branch.

create.title: Hire a new staff member
create.subtitle: We will generate a 6-digit PIN you can share with them.

pin_modal.title: One-time PIN
pin_modal.subtitle: Share this PIN with {name} through a secure channel. They will type it into the POS device to unlock their shift.
pin_modal.one_shot_warning: This PIN is shown once. After you close this dialog it cannot be retrieved — only reset.

terminate_dialog.title: Terminate employment?
terminate_dialog.body: {name} will be removed from the roster and their PIN will stop working immediately.
terminate_dialog.note: The record stays in your audit trail so past order history still attributes correctly.

branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Rename your locations, fix manager contact details, set opening hours, and tune POS defaults for each branch.
branches.search_placeholder: Search by name, code, or manager…
branches.empty_state: No branches yet. Contact your MITHQAL account manager to onboard a new location.
branches.add_branch_hint: Need a new branch? Adding or removing a branch is an admin operation — file a support ticket and your MITHQAL account manager will provision it for you.
branches.permission_error: You do not have permission to perform that action.

fields.name: Branch name
fields.status_disabled_hint: Only an account super admin can activate or deactivate a branch.

devices.title: Devices on this branch
devices.read_only_hint: Devices are assigned and managed by the admin. You can see them here but cannot change them.
devices.empty: No devices assigned to this branch yet.

show.no_products: No products carried at this branch yet.
show.no_staff: No staff assigned to this branch.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Define which features each role can access, then assign those roles to your portal users.
roles.system_hint: System roles are part of MITHQAL's defaults. You can edit which permissions they hold but can't rename or delete them.
roles.delete_blocked_hint: Re-assign the users holding this role before deleting it.

editor.system_role_hint: This is a system role — the name cannot be changed but you can edit which permissions it holds.

delete_dialog.title: Delete role?
delete_dialog.body: The role "{name}" will be removed. This cannot be undone.

floor_plan.title: Floor Plan
floor_plan.subtitle: Define the floors at each branch and the tables on each floor. Tables get a unique QR code customers can scan to open the menu on their phone.
floor_plan.no_branches: Add a branch first to build a floor plan.
floor_plan.empty_state: No floors yet for this branch.
floor_plan.empty_hint: Add your first floor (Main Hall, Patio, VIP, etc.) to get started.
floor_plan.no_tables: No tables yet on this floor. Add one to get started.
floor_plan.delete_floor_blocked: Move or delete this floor's tables before deleting the floor.

planner.title: Planner — {name}
planner.confirm_discard: You have unsaved layout changes. Discard?
planner.help_can_manage: Drag tables to position them. Snaps to a 20px grid. Press Esc to cancel a drag in progress.
planner.help_view_only: Read-only view. Only users with floor-plan manage permission can move tables.
planner.no_tables_hint: Add a table to this floor before opening the planner.

qr_modal.title: QR code for {label}
qr_modal.subtitle: Customers scan this to open your menu on their phone. Print the token onto a card and place it at the table.
qr_modal.menu_url_hint: Menu URL will be /menu?t={token} once the customer-facing app ships.

delete_table_dialog.title: Delete table?
delete_table_dialog.body: Delete table "{label}"? Past orders that reference it will still resolve.

catalogue.title: Catalogue
catalogue.subtitle: Manage menu categories, products, and add-on options. Recipes and inventory mapping arrive in the next phase.
catalogue.delete_category_blocked: Move or delete the category's products before deleting it.
catalogue.empty_categories: No categories yet. Add one to start building your menu.
catalogue.empty_products: No products yet. Add one to start your menu.
catalogue.empty_addon_groups: No add-on groups yet. Add one to let cashiers attach modifiers like milk choice, sugar level, or extras.

fields.name: Name
fields.delivery_price_hint: Leave blank to use the base price. Set when delivery orders need a higher price (to absorb aggregator commissions, etc.).
fields.tax_rate_hint: Leave blank to inherit the company default (5%).
fields.is_global_hint: Global groups attach automatically to every product. Otherwise pick which products use this group from each product's edit screen.
fields.addon_groups_hint: Pick which add-on groups appear when this product is selected on the POS. Global groups are always included and not shown here.

catalogue.delete_addon_group_blocked: Detach this add-on group from all products before deleting it.

delete_addon_group_dialog.title: Delete add-on group?
delete_addon_group_dialog.body: Delete "{name}" and all its options? This cannot be undone.

delete_addon_dialog.title: Delete option?
delete_addon_dialog.body: Delete "{name}"? Past orders that reference it will still resolve via the soft-delete trail.

recipe.section_hint: Map ingredients consumed per sale. A latte might use 0.180 L milk + 0.018 kg espresso beans. Empty recipe = pre-made goods, no inventory deduction on sale.
recipe.no_lines: No recipe yet — this product is treated as pre-made.
recipe.no_ingredients_hint: Create an ingredient on the Inventory page first, then come back to build the recipe.
recipe.live_cost_hint: Sum of (quantity × ingredient default cost) at current prices. Phase 8 sale orders snapshot the historical cost separately.
recipe.margin_hint: Computed as (base price − recipe cost) ÷ base price.
recipe.duplicate_ingredient: Each ingredient can appear at most once in the recipe.

delete_prod_dialog.title: Delete product?
delete_prod_dialog.body: Delete "{name}"? Past orders that reference it will still resolve via the soft-delete trail.

branches.section_hint: Choose which branches sell this product and set per-branch units. Branch location & devices are managed by the admin.
branches.all_branches_hint: This product shows on every branch POS. Untick to choose specific branches.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Manage ingredients, suppliers, and per-branch stock balances. Every change writes to an append-only movement ledger.
inventory.no_branches: Add a branch first to track stock.

fields.name: Name
fields.min_stock_threshold_hint: Below this quantity the stock is flagged as Low. Leave blank to never flag.
fields.signed_quantity_hint: Positive = found more than expected, negative = found less.
fields.note_required_hint: Explain why the stock count changed. This shows in the audit log.
fields.unit_cost_hint: Leave blank to use the ingredient's default cost.

inventory.empty_ingredients: No ingredients yet. Add one to start tracking stock.
inventory.empty_suppliers: No suppliers yet. Add one so ingredients can reference them.
inventory.empty_stock: No stock recorded at this branch yet. Use Restock above to log your opening inventory.
inventory.empty_movements: No movements at this branch yet.
inventory.delete_ingredient_blocked: Adjust stock to zero in every branch before deleting this ingredient.
inventory.delete_supplier_blocked: Re-assign or clear ingredients that name this supplier before deleting.

adjust_modal.title: Adjust stock — {ingredient}
adjust_modal.subtitle: Records an Adjustment movement. Use a positive quantity if a physical count shows more than the system says; use negative if it shows less.

restock_modal.title: Restock — {ingredient}
restock_modal.subtitle: Logs a positive inflow at the chosen unit cost. Optional supplier reference helps the future supplier-performance report.

delete_ing_dialog.title: Delete ingredient?
delete_ing_dialog.body: Delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone. Historical stock movements will still resolve via the soft-delete trail.

delete_sup_dialog.title: Delete supplier?
delete_sup_dialog.body: Delete "{name}"? Historical movements that referenced this supplier will show "no longer on file" instead.

waste.empty: No waste recorded yet. Use Record waste to log the first event.
waste.no_branch: Pick a branch above to see its waste history.

modal.title: Record waste at {branch}
modal.notes_help_other: Notes are required when reason is Other.
modal.occurred_at_help: Leave blank to record as now.
modal.cost_preview_hint: Quantity × current unit cost — server freezes this at record time.
modal.insufficient_warning: Not enough stock at this branch to absorb this waste — adjust first.

restock.empty: No restock requests yet. Branches can submit one from the Branch Stock tab — or create a draft here.

create_modal.duplicate_warning: An ingredient appears more than once — merge them into a single line.

review_modal.reject_hint: A rejection reason is required — the requester needs to know why.

cancel_modal.title: Cancel request
cancel_modal.hint: Optional reason (stored on the request for audit).

allocate_modal.title: Allocate request
allocate_modal.hint: Default = send the full requested amount of every line. Override per line for partial fulfillment, or set 0 to skip a line.

transfers.empty: No transfers yet. Move ingredients between branches with the New transfer button.

create_modal.title: New branch transfer
create_modal.same_branch: Source and destination must be different branches.
create_modal.no_lines: Add at least one ingredient line.
create_modal.note_placeholder: e.g. covering a shortfall at the other branch
create_modal.duplicate_warning: An ingredient appears more than once — merge them into a single line.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Your customer book — lookup by name, phone, or vehicle plate. Attach multiple plates per customer for drive-thru recognition.
customers.search_placeholder: Search by name, phone, or plate…
customers.empty_state: No customers yet. Add your first one to get started.

delete.title: Delete customer?
delete.confirm: Remove {name} from your customer book? Vehicle plates remain attached and the customer can be restored from the audit log.

errors.duplicate_plate_local: That plate is already in your pending list.
errors.save_failed: Could not save the customer. Try again.

loyalty.title: Loyalty Rules
loyalty.subtitle: Define visit-based stamp cards and spend-based point rules. Multiple can run in parallel; pause or resume any rule without deleting it. Per-customer balances live on the Customers page.
loyalty.empty: No loyalty rules yet. Create a points or stamp-card rule to get started.

modal.type_locked: Type can't change after creation — create a new rule instead.

delete.title: Delete loyalty rule?
delete.confirm: Delete {name}? Customer balances under this rule are retained for history; the rule disappears from the POS picker.

customer.title: Loyalty & wallet
customer.wallet_hint: Top up takes a positive amount with optional reason. Adjust takes a signed amount + required reason.

errors.rule_save_failed: Could not save the loyalty rule.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.subtitle: Define the taxes your company collects (e.g. VAT, Municipality). The POS fetches the active set when staff log in and adds each, as its own line, on top of every order total.
taxes.empty_state: No taxes yet. Add VAT or any charge your company collects.
taxes.delete_confirm: Delete {name}? It stops applying at the POS on the next sync.

delivery_providers.subtitle: Manage the third-party aggregators your branches deliver through. Per-product prices live on each product (see the Provider Pricing section in the product modal).
delivery_providers.empty_state: No providers yet. Add Talabat, Otlob, or any aggregator you use.

fields.name: Provider name
fields.color_hint: Used by the POS picker to distinguish providers at a glance.

delete.title: Delete provider?
delete.confirm: Soft-delete {name}? Per-product price overrides stay in place for historical orders, and the provider can be restored from the audit log.

product_grid.title: Provider pricing
product_grid.hint: Set a per-provider override. Empty = fall back to the product's delivery price, then to the base price.

errors.prices_load_failed: Could not load this product's provider prices.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.subtitle: Configure promo rules that the POS applies automatically. Combine percent + fixed amounts across products, categories, and order totals.
discounts.empty_state: No discount rules yet. Add a Ramadan promo or a happy-hour rule to get started.

fields.name: Name
fields.target_products_hint: Select one or more products. The rule will only fire on lines whose product is checked here.
fields.time_hint: Leave blank for all day. Crossing midnight is supported (e.g. 22:00 to 02:00).
fields.stackable: Stackable (can combine with other discounts + loyalty)

delete.title: Delete discount?
delete.confirm: Soft-delete {name}? Historical orders that used this rule keep the snapshotted amount; the rule disappears from the POS picker.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Tenant reports across sales, customers, inventory, staff, and more. Filter by date window and (optionally) branch.

sales.title: Sales
sales.desc: Gross + net + discounts + tax + refunds by hour, weekday, payment, type, branch.

customers.title: Customers
customers.desc: Top customers, new vs returning, loyalty points issued + redeemed + liability.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.desc: Total discount value, share of gross, by branch (rule + staff land in Phase 8).

product_performance.title: Product Performance
product_performance.desc: Top sellers by revenue + qty, slow movers, top add-ons.

recipe_cost.title: Recipe & Cost
recipe_cost.desc: Per-product theoretical cost, profit, margin (trend lands in Phase 8).

staff_activity.title: Staff Activity
staff_activity.desc: Per-staff orders paid, revenue, avg ticket, voids, discounts, hours logged.

inventory_consumption.title: Inventory Consumption
inventory_consumption.desc: Per-ingredient consumed in window, days of stock, low-stock flag.

loss_waste.title: Loss / Waste
loss_waste.desc: Total waste value, by branch, by reason, top wasted ingredients.

restock_purchasing.title: Restock / Purchasing
restock_purchasing.desc: Restock spend by supplier, by branch, top purchased ingredients.

round_up_donation.title: Round-Up Donations
round_up_donation.desc: Total raised, by charity, by branch (lands in Phase 9 — currently zeroed).

round_up_donation.stub_banner: Round-Up donations land with Phase 9. This report renders zeroed values today and will start filling in once the donation infrastructure ships.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Review expenses captured from the POS (and logged here in the back office). Approve, reject with a reason, or annotate. Reviewed + recorded expenses feed the net-profit line of the Sales Report.
expenses.empty: No expenses match the current filters.

dashboard_widgets.low_stock_subtitle: Ingredients with a balance below their minimum threshold across all branches.
dashboard_widgets.load_failed: Could not load the dashboard summary.

audit_log.title: Audit Log
audit_log.subtitle: Every audit-able action by your team, with actor, target, and before/after snapshots. Restricted to roles with the audit_log.view permission.
audit_log.no_rows: No audit events match the current filters.
audit_log.load_failed: Could not load the audit log.

orders.title: Sales / Orders
orders.subtitle: Every order across your branches. Filter by date, branch, or status.

detail.title: Order detail
detail.no_loyalty: No loyalty activity on this order.
